title: ConicDuels
description: The Next-Gen Ultra-Light Practice Core plugin.
body:
# ⚡ **ConicDuels – UPDATE 1.5.0**

**The Next-Gen Ultra-Light Practice Core for 1.21+**

__This is a developer build, please report bugs if you find any.__
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

## 📝 Overview
**ConicDuels** is an ultra-optimized Practice Core plugin for **Paper 1.21–1.21.8** that combines **Kits, Parties, Duels, Arenas, Stats, and AutoGG** into one performance-focused package — perfect for competitive PvP environments.

> **ConicDuels 1.5.0-DEV build is buggy & not perfectly tested, please reach out github or discord to report bugs.**

Read [**Documents Here**](https://github.com/SwarajDev5/ConicCore/)

---

## 🚀 What's New in 1.5.0
✔ **Completely Reworked Party System** (Merged from ConicDuels)
✔ **Dedicated 1v1 Duels System** (Merged from ConicDuels)
✔ **Auto Arena Reset System** integration for Duels (Requires a dependency)
✔ **Hex Color Code Support** for all messages and configuration.
✔ Full compatibility with the new command and permission structure.

---

## ✨ Features
✅ Ultra-lightweight & performance-optimized
✅ Fully in-game kit creation & editing
✅ **Advanced Party System** (chat, fights, invites, kicks, admin tools)
✅ **Dedicated Duel System** with kit selection, rounds, and new commands
✅ **Auto Arena Reset** (Requires ConicArena + FastAsyncWorldEdit/WorldEdit)
✅ Arena creation & teleportation commands
✅ AutoGG toggle system
✅ Works perfectly on Practice & PvP servers
✅ Built for Paper 1.21.x
✅ PlaceholderAPI integration
✅ **Hex Color Code Support**

---

## ⚙ Dependencies
**Hard Dependency:**
* ConicArena

**Soft Dependencies (Required for Arena Management/Reset):**
* FastAsyncWorldEdit **or** WorldEdit

---

## ⌨ Commands
| Command | Description | Usage Examples |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **`/conic`** | Main plugin command. | `/conic setspawn`, `/conic reload` |
| **`/spawn`** | Teleport to spawn. | `/spawn`, `/spawn <player>` |
| **`/kit`** | Kit management. | `/kit create <name>`, `/kit list` |
| **`/kiteditor`** | Edit kits in-game. | `/kiteditor edit <kit>`, `/kiteditor save` |
| **`/giveeditedkit`**| Give an edited kit to a player. | `/giveeditedkit <kit> <player>` |
| **`/arenas`** | Arena management. | `/arenas create <name>`, `/arenas reset <name>` |
| **`/party`** | Party system commands. | `/party create`, `/party invite <player>`, `/party fight` |
| **`/duel`** | Duel a player. | `/duel <player>`, `/duel accept` |
| **`/partyaccept`** | Accept a party invite. | `/partyaccept` |
| **`/partyfight`** | Accept a party fight request. | `/partyfight` |
| **`/stats`** | View player stats. | `/stats [player]` |
| **`/autoggtoggle`**| Toggle the AutoGG feature. | `/autoggtoggle` |

---

## 🔐 Permissions
| Permission | Description | Default |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `conicduels.*` | All ConicCore/Duels commands. | `op` |
| `conicduels.admin` | Access to admin commands. | `op` |
| `conicduels.spawn` | Use `/spawn`. | `true` |
| `conicduels.spawn.others`| Teleport others with `/spawn`. | `op` |
| `conicduels.kit` | Access to kit commands. | `true` |
| `conicduels.kiteditor`| Access to kit editor. | `true` |
| `conicduels.givekit` | Give kits to others. | `op` |
| `conicduels.arenas.admin`| Manage arenas. | `op` |
| `conicduels.party` | Access to party commands. | `true` |
| `conicduels.duel` | Access to duel commands. | `true` |
| `conicduels.reload` | Reload the plugin. | `op` |
| `conicduels.spectate` | Spectate duels. | `true` |
| `conicduels.bypass.cooldown` | Bypass all cooldowns. | `op` |
| `conicduels.bypass.build` | Bypass build restrictions. | `op` |
| `conicduels.bypass.break` | Bypass break restrictions. | `op` |

---

## 📥 Installation
1.  Download the latest **ConicDuels.jar** **and** **ConicArena.jar**.
2.  Place them in your `/plugins` folder.
3.  Ensure you also have **FastAsyncWorldEdit** or **WorldEdit** installed if you plan on using arenas with auto-reset.
4.  Start your server.
5.  Configure zones using `/conic setspawn` & `/conic setediting`.
6.  Enjoy a full-featured Practice Core system!

💬 Support & Issues
Github: [Click Here](https://github.com/SwarajDev5/ConicCore/issues/)
